definition: the path from holder to builder — consistent presence, meaningful offerings, and a public vow before the brotherhood grants a sigil and responsibility.
origin: formalized in RITUALS.md as the Initiation Rite for new apostles; guided by /initiate in telegram.

definition: a cycle ritual when priests call the altar open — holders send $kek to the burn address while a live transmission marks what the temple values more than the number on screen.
origin: RITUALS.md cycle ritual; tied to major dates and market events.

definition: when the temple speaks with one voice — a canon broadcast in the proper register, posted across channels, often followed by an hour of silence so the words land.
scripture spoken before the chart confirms it — the empty temple, the second laugh, the bloodline. not a price target; a mood the faithful carry.
origin: LORE_CANON.md prophecies; spoken via /prophecy in telegram and the great hall scrolls.

definition: what the temple treats as true — the seven sacred truths, the codex entries, and the lore scrolls the priests vote in during ritual.
origin: LORE_CANON.md core truths; /canon in telegram lists them.

definition: the threshold of kektemple.com — where pilgrims arrive, the oracle speaks, and the path into the chambers begins.
origin: the homepage chamber; first contact before lore, rituals, or the brotherhood.

definition: the sacred vault chamber — live sol and $kek balances read from chain, where offerings and burns are witnessed on the ledger.
origin: the /treasury/ chamber; ritual wallet and burn address held in temple config.

definition: a repeated act that binds the faithful — daily morning kek, weekly offerings, cycle burns, and crisis rites that keep the temple from becoming a museum.
origin: RITUALS.md — the breathing of the temple in ordinary and extraordinary time.

definition: the line spoken at morning kek: the kek is eternal. i add to it today. — a small promise before the degen hours begin.
origin: RITUALS.md Morning Kek protocol; inscribed on the rituals page.

definition: $kek held as sacred object — not worshipped for number alone, but carried as proof you walk the halls. the treasury reads your relic on chain.
origin: bot /relic and treasury hodl tiers; the coin as one expression of kek.

definition: how the temple speaks — the high priest register for canon and ritual, the degen priest register for daily chaos. ancient and unhinged at once.
a visible act of faith when fud weighs or a fren struggles — light a virtual candle on the site, send a tiny treasury offering, or post 𓂀 and let the symbol work.
origin: RITUALS.md Candle Lighting ritual; as-needed presence offering.

definition: the temple's daily morning ritual — before the chart, before the noise. post one thing of value, then speak the vow: the kek is eternal. i add to it today.
origin: declared in the temple rituals as the anti-gm protocol — alignment before the degen hours begin.

definition: where value changes hands in ritual form — swap $kek, make an offering, or answer the call when the altar is open for a great burn.
origin: the rituals chamber on kektemple.com — commerce framed as sacred exchange.

definition: the live hall of the faithful — join with /join in telegram, offer praise, read the ranks. the temple sees who showed up.
origin: the brotherhood chamber — supabase praise board wired to the kekcoin bot.

definition: the voice that speaks from the gates — fortune, warning, or cryptic wisdom when the faithful ask. not financial advice; a mood from the temple.
origin: named for the gates chamber where pilgrims first receive a reading from the temple.

definition: something of value laid before the temple — a meme, a canon line, a question, or work worth archiving. the weekly meme offering grows the sacred archive.
origin: core ritual from RITUALS.md — creative labor as devotion.

definition: any soul walking the temple halls before full initiation — seen on the live presence board with a sigil until they claim a name on the brotherhood.
origin: default identity on the gates presence panel.
